positive: A mystical celestial beast, a stylized phoenix-lion hybrid, rendered in a highly detailed linework style with bold black outlines and negative space. The creature is dramatically posed, wings spread wide and framing the composition, displaying feather-like scales and muscular tension. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt gold, and crisp white, suggesting an elegant, vintage stained-glass or woodcut aesthetic. Central composition, high contrast, clean silhouette, perfect for a t-shirt print. The background should be minimal, incorporating swirling cosmic dust patterns that define the creature without overwhelming it. Highly graphic, detailed etching.
